name: What's Coming in 2025?
description: A full 3D brand film for Artlist â a continuous camera journey through a stylized 3D world.
credits: ‍Brand Creative Director: Lena Shulman Shein,  Creative Director: Itzik Cohen,  ‍Motion & Video Editor:Aviad Chai,  Design: Sahar Hayun Ben-Naim, Sound design: Guy Shavitt‏  ,Copy: Ayala Levi
blocks: [{"type":"split-left","media":"/assets/1774639219198-do5a.mp4","title":"Beyond What You Thought Possible","text":"A vision-led campaign for Artlist that invites creators to step into 2025 and imagine what’s possible when creative freedom meets emerging AI tools. The film presents creativity as an open canvas, where ideas expand and limitations fade."},{"type":"split-right","title":"Crafting the Vision in Motion","text":"As a Motion Designer, I collaborated closely with the creative team on shaping the narrative and visual language, translating abstract ideas into motion through animation, shot design, and 3D integration. The campaign reached 1.4 million views on YouTube and was also broadcast as a television commercial.","media":"/assets/1774639504516-jd5w.mp4"},{"type":"duo","media1":"/assets/1774639530740-x3rj.mp4","media2":"/assets/1774639522705-2vba.mp4"}]

name: Nao Sushi
description: Elegant brand motion for Nao Sushi â Japanese minimalism meets modern animation.
credits: Brand Design: Aviad Chai, Client: Nao Sushi
blocks: [{"type":"split-left","media":"/assets/1774638580987-xcby.gif","title":"Concept & Logo Design","text":"The brand identity for NAO Sushi was built around a simple and recognizable idea: the sushi box. The logo takes inspiration from the clean geometry of a takeaway box, with chopsticks integrated on the sides to create a balanced and memorable mark. The result is minimal, modern, and instantly connected to the product."},{"type":"split-right","title":"Visual Language","text":"The visual language draws from Japanese aesthetics, particularly the symbolism of the rising sun. Circular forms, warm tones, and strong contrasts create a bold yet refined look that reflects both tradition and contemporary design. This influence brings a sense of origin and cultural depth to the brand without feeling literal.","media":"/assets/1774638796712-zj1b.gif"},{"type":"duo","media1":"/assets/1774631596273-cxls.jpg","media2":"/assets/1774631600007-tk1w.jpg"},{"type":"quote","text":"Rooted in the spirit of the rising sun, shaped with modern precision."},{"type":"single","url":"/assets/1774631611519-u9jp.gif"},{"type":"duo","media1":"/assets/1774639073111-cuod.jpg","media2":"/assets/1774638990968-2lyu.jpg"},{"type":"single","url":"/assets/1774631581024-3wrs.mp4"}]
